name: healthlens-ai
description: Personal Health Intelligence System — extract, track, and understand medical records over time

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.vercel-build: npm install --prefix client && npm run build --prefix client && node -e "const fs=require('fs');fs.rmSync('public',{recursive:true,force:true});fs.cpSync('client/dist','public',{recursive:true});"
